TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-sanglacay_kuliya,_sanglacay_koliya, title = nipaluma-sanglacay_kuliya,_sanglacay_koliya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-sanglacay_kuliya,_sanglacay_koliya} }

S.FORM: == sanglacay kuliya, sanglacay koliya == ÁôĹť¶¨ťĹíŤéß u sapayu' atu lami, kapah mukan. mauzip i caay katalakaway a buyu atu bukilalan. u cacay a mihcan ku uzip, siheciay a lutuk. landaway ku papah, sumamahay ku kaway, takuliaway ku balu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj kur~…ĺija, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj kor~…ĺija == **** u sapaju Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺami, kapańß mukan. mauzip i ¶aaj katar~…ĺakawaj a buju atu bukir~…ĺar~…ĺan. u ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶an ku uzip, sińß…ô ¶iaj a r~…ĺutuk. r~…ĺandawaj ku papańß, sumamańßaj ku kawaj, takur~…ĺiawaj ku bar~…ĺu. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == sanglacay kuliya, sanglacay koliya == ÁôĹť¶¨ťĹíŤéß u sapayu' atu lami, kapah mukan. mauzip i caay katalakaway a buyu atu bukilalan. u cacay a mihcan ku uzip, siheciay a lutuk. landaway ku papah, sumamahay ku kaway, takuliaway ku balu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
